# Sprint 1.1 Crm Data Ingestion

**Project:** Customer Churn Prediction and Retention System
**Sprint:** Sprint 1. Data Ingestion
**Objective:** Ingest data from various sources into the system, including CRM, product and usage, support and sentiment, marketing engagement, and billing and payments.

## Description
Ingest CRM data into the system, including customer identifiers, lifecycle stage, account owner, and contract metadata.

## Deliverable
CRM data ingested into the system
